title: Martin Aspinwall
extract: Martin Aspinwall (born 21 October 1981) is an English former rugby league footballer. He played as a winger and centre for most of his career, playing in the Super League for the Wigan Warriors and the Huddersfield Giants. He later switched to loose forward, and went on to play for the Castleford Tigers and Hull F.C in the Super League, Leigh Centurions in the Championship and the Barrow Raiders in League 1.
